tests.note: Tests not available for Supabase functions - implementation verified by code review

lint.note: Pre-existing lint errors in React/TypeScript files - no new errors introduced by this implementation

AC1.verification: grep confirms cancel command in slash-commands.ts SUPPORTED_COMMANDS array

AC2.description: Active deep research session running -> User types /cancel -> Session marked as 'cancelled'
AC2.verification: cancel-handler.ts implements getActiveSession() and cancelSession() functions that update status to 'cancelled'

AC3.description: User attempts to cancel another user's session -> Request rejected with 403 error
AC3.verification: RLS policies on deep_research_sessions table prevent cross-user updates. Handler checks error.code for permission errors

AC4.description: No active session in conversation -> User receives helpful message
AC4.verification: handleCancelCommand() returns 'No active research to cancel. Start a new research session with /deep-research.' when session is null
